title: Verify existing implementation of input sanitizer
description: The `sanitizeInput(input: string): string` function in `src/middleware/sanitize.ts` already exists and strips HTML tags, trims whitespace, and normalizes unicode via NFC normalization. All 11 tests in `src/middleware/sanitize.test.ts` pass.
existing_patterns: src/middleware/sanitize.ts implements stripHtmlTags, normalizeUnicode, and sanitizeInput functions following the middleware utility pattern
src/middleware/sanitize.test.ts follows the same vitest test structure as other middleware tests in src/middleware/
